Maybe out of reach but never out of heart . EVERY HEART IS TRUELY UNIQUE: Unlike other brands our beautiful plaques are made from raw wood and not a laminated MDF. Each heart is hand finished with a lacquer varnish that really accentuates the the deep colour of the wood and also makes the ink of the pattern/text clearer and brighter in colour.

description: Product Description Cherish Every Moment with Heartfelt Decor Introducing our beautifully crafted wooden heart hanging ornaments, designed to add a touch of charm and warmth to any space! Whether you're celebrating a special occasion or simply want to share a heartfelt message, our wooden hearts make the perfect keepsake. Featuring elegant designs and thoughtful messages, these ornaments are a meaningful way to express love, gratitude, and joy. Creating Thoughtful Gifts Since 2014 Based in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, our journey began in 2014 as a small printing company specialising in personalised printing on mugs, garments, and phone cases. Over the years, we expanded our collection to include handcrafted wooden ornaments, each designed with care and attention to detail. Our mission is to create high-quality, meaningful gifts that bring happiness and lasting memories. A Gift for Every Occasion Celebrate life's special moments with our unique wooden heart ornaments! Whether it's a birthday, anniversary, wedding, housewarming, retirement, or simply to show appreciation, our beautifully designed hearts are perfect for any occasion. Hang them in your home, on a Christmas tree, or gift them to a loved one as a lasting symbol of affection. Sustainability at Heart Our wooden heart ornaments are crafted from sustainably sourced materials, whilst ensuring a durable product. We are committed to reducing environmental impact by using responsibly sourced wood and minimal packaging, allowing you to celebrate special moments with peace of mind. Designed & Made in the UK Each wooden heart is carefully designed and crafted in the UK by a passionate small business dedicated to quality and creativity. We take pride in every piece we create, ensuring they bring joy and sentimental value to all who receive them. Celebrate with a heartfelt touch, knowing your ornament is made with love and care.
